name: lib-voicemail-graveyard
caption:
Voicemail is where leads go to die.

Nobody leaves one. They hang up and ring the next trade. If your 'backup' for a missed call is voicemail, you don't have a backup.

Free missed-call audit — link in bio. 👇

#plumber #electrician #tradesbusiness #ukandireland #missedcalls

slides.body: Nobody leaves one. They just ring the next trade.
